productDisplayName: Nike Men Club Polo Black T-shirt

FitComfortWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not dry clean or bleachTumble dry lowWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsDesigned to offer exemplary comfort, this striped polo T-shirt from nike is crafted from a soft cotton fabric in a perfect blend of colours to add a sporty edge to your style.
